projects.name: visa

service.stop_command:
PID_FILE="{remote_dir}/app.pid"
if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then
  PID=$(cat "$PID_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
  if [ -n "$PID" ] && ps -p "$PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    kill -15 "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
    i=0
    while [ $i -lt 60 ]; do
      if ! ps -p "$PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        break
      fi
      sleep 1
      i=$((i + 1))
    done
    kill -9 "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
  rm -f "$PID_FILE"
fi
service.status_command: PID_FILE="{remote_dir}/app.pid"; if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then PID=$(cat "$PID_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true); ps -p "$PID" -o pid,etime,cmd 2>/dev/null || true; else echo no-pid-file; fi

projects.description: 签证业务后台 API 服务
